subcodes.title: Words spoken at Theosophical Society in Paris, Nov. 1911
subcodes.first_line: Since my arrival in Paris, I have been told of the Theosophical Society, and I know that it is composed of
subcodes.subjects: @independent investigation of truth; reality, @unity; oneness of humanity, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @religion as source of love and unity, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @The Holy Spirit, @oneness; unity of religion, @harmony of science and religion, @equality of men and women, @supreme tribunal, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @non-participation in politics
